steps.title: Compare energy densities
steps.content: The sentence asks for the fuel with the highest energy density. On the graph, the correct completion must match the tallest bar, not merely a fuel with a high or moderate value.

steps.title: Use the tallest bar
steps.content: Choice A is high but below the tallest bar. Choice C is the lowest, and Choice D is also below the tallest bar. The remaining fuel has the greatest energy density shown. The answer is B.
